identity: Human MAN (male), about 30 years old, long wavy auburn-brown hair falling past the shoulders, warm brown eyes, trimmed mustache and goatee, confident smirk.
outfit: Bright red coat with gold trim along the lapels and wide gold-trimmed cuffs, open at the chest revealing a cream linen inner shirt, brown leather gloves.
weapons: A slender steel rapier with a simple silver swept-hilt held upright in the right hand.
attackStyle: East-facing. Mid-lunge rapier thrust forward at chest height with the right hand, left arm flared back for balance, red coat tails streaming, one leg extended forward.
spellStyle: East-facing. Rapier held to the side, left hand flourished forward with a glittering silver spark trailing through the air.
blockStyle: East-facing. Rapier held vertically in front of the body as a parry guard, chin tucked, back straight.
koStyle: East-facing, on one knee, rapier fallen beside him, head bowed, red coat slumped.
southStyle: Facing camera (south), dashing idle. Rapier held point-down in the right hand at his side, left hand on hip, coat slightly open.
portraitStyle: Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Long wavy auburn-brown hair, mustache and goatee, red coat with gold trim over a cream linen shirt, slender steel rapier held upright in the right hand.

referenceSheet.prompt:
IDENTITY (this image becomes the canonical identity anchor — preserve in every downstream frame): Human MAN (male), about 30 years old, long wavy auburn-brown hair falling past the shoulders, warm brown eyes, trimmed mustache and goatee, confident smirk.

OUTFIT: Bright red coat with gold trim along the lapels and wide gold-trimmed cuffs, open at the chest revealing a cream linen inner shirt, brown leather gloves.

WEAPONS: A slender steel rapier with a simple silver swept-hilt held upright in the right hand.

CLASS: humanoid. Full-body view, head to feet visible.

POSE: full-body side profile facing right (east), calm combat-ready idle. Head up, eyes visible. NOT a portrait bust, NOT a close-up — entire character from head to feet.

AGE & PROPORTIONS (non-negotiable): character is a fully-grown adult about 28-32 years old with standard heroic adult proportions (approximately 6 feet / 180 cm tall). NOT a child, NOT a teenager, NOT elderly, NOT a graybeard wizard.

BODY PROPORTIONS (non-negotiable): realistic adult human head-to-body ratio — the head is approximately 1/7 to 1/8 of the total body height. TALL and SLENDER with long adult legs (roughly half of total height), a full-length adult torso, and normal-sized adult shoulders. NOT chibi, NOT bobblehead, NOT big-head-small-body, NOT child-bodied, NOT stubby. The silhouette must read as a tall adult, never as a kid in adult clothes.

SCALE (non-negotiable): full-body figure occupies approximately 85% of the 256x256 canvas height, feet near the bottom edge, head near the top — consistent scale with other adult humanoid characters in the same sprite set.

LIGHTING (non-negotiable): bright evenly-lit pixel art, NOT silhouetted, NOT overly dark, NOT cast in deep shadow. All colors, facial features, and outfit details must be fully readable.

STYLE: detailed pixel art with clean readable silhouette, warm pixel-art palette, transparent background, no ground shadow.
